This increases performance by ~10%.

Moist baroclinic wave with lazy broadcasting in main: https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-gpulongruns/builds/534#019603e5-3536-4620-a9fc-5bbb793a71c8 SYPD 2.18
Moist baroclinic wave with temporary scalar: [https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-gpulongruns/builds/535#019607a0-1a56-44df-b13c-c333b3ed6567 SYPD 2.5](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-gpulongruns/builds/536#01960dbc-b731-49ee-a299-528da8193894) SYPD 2.46

title: use temporary field instead of lazy broadcasting in the implicit solver
